intro: Even as an AI beginner, Echobird lets you command your own Agent — from setup to work — through simple chat.

steps.title: Add an AI Model
steps.desc: The quickest way to start. Get an API key from MiniMax, GLM, Moonshot AI, Anthropic, or any OpenAI-compatible provider — then add it here in [Model Nexus]. Alternatively, if you have a capable machine at home, you can run a local model instead.

steps.title: Prepare a Machine
steps.desc: Your Agent needs a dedicated machine to run on. A spare home computer works great — macOS enables more complex tasks.

steps.title: Deploy Your Agent
steps.desc: In [Mother Agent], select the model you just added and follow the setup flow to deploy your own AI Agent onto that machine.

steps.title: Add Skills & Get to Work
steps.desc: Browse [Skill Browser] to bookmark the capabilities you want. Then head to [Channels] and chat with your Agent to assign skills or kick off a work plan — just like messaging a teammate.
